verses.commentary: Some time later. High positions. Fallen from favor.
Chief positions.
Put in custody. Potiphar's prison.
He attended them. His domain expands.
Same night. Ironic: Joseph imprisoned partly for his dreams, now will interpret others' dreams.
Joseph observes.
Compassion for fellow prisoners.
Both had dreams. Joseph deflects credit to God. Faith statement. Offers to help.
Symbol of abundance.
Three branches. Accelerated growth.
Squeezed into cup.
Clear symbolism.
Within three days. Restore position. Good news.
Remember me. Show kindness (chesed, חֶסֶד). Get me out. Reasonable appeal. He's innocent.
Forcibly carried off from land of Hebrews.
Three baskets of bread on head. Three again.
Ominous detail. Failed duty.
This is meaning. Same timeframe.
Within three days. Impale on pole. Terrible news. Lift off head vs lift up head (verse 13). Dark wordplay.
Third day. Pharaoh's birthday. Before officials. Pharaoh acts.
Restored cupbearer.
Impaled chief baker. Bad news confirmed. Perfect fulfillment.
Forgot him. Two more years will pass (41:1).
